title: Orginial DeckSMP
description: This SMP plugin adds cards to the game each coming with their own unique ability.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dGihwUHvukc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is the original **DeckSMP** plugin, there comes some bugs, and i wont work on this project at all after uploading.

Deck adds mulitple mythical cards that each give special abilities on use.

Author Note: I will not work on this plugin. Why? Cause i dont have motivation to work on this, Credits to Frwost for being the original Dev, creating the deck smp, shame to pixby for selling me this plugin.
